title: v2-T2: writing-plans-bdd dependency DAG + failing-test sub-issue + parallel markers
description: Per behavior: a RED 'write failing test' sub-issue that blocks the GREEN 'implement' sub-issue (bd dep). Cross-behavior deps as bd edges. Parallel-dispatch rule via bd ready.
close_reason: GREEN: implemented per plan; 5 guardrails pass; staged test(red)->feat(green) commits; flowchart synced

title: v2-T1: grant Skill tool + require invoke (shims)
description: bc-implementer/bc-reviewer: tools += Skill; replace passive 'Skills I load' with explicit FIRST ACTION invoke-procedure directive; implementer becomes per-sub-issue worker.
close_reason: GREEN: implemented per plan; 5 guardrails pass; staged test(red)->feat(green) commits; flowchart synced

title: v2: enforce plan/TDD discipline via router orchestration + observable-artifact gate
description: Live test off PR#1 showed the contract ran but writing-plans-bdd/TDD did NOT visibly run: no bd sub-issues for the plan, no test-first evidence in the squashed commit. Root cause: implementer subagent has no Skill tool (tools: Read,Edit,Write,Bash,Grep,Glob) so 'Skills I load' is inert; and the only required evidence is passing scenarios, so process discipline is unobserved/unenforced. Fix: (1) make plan+TDD observable and gated — bd sub-issues incl. an explicit 'write failing test' sub-issue; a test(red) commit must precede its feat(green) commit; reviewer/work-done-gate blocks if absent. (2) decide orchestration shape (router-orchestrated per-sub-issue vs single-subagent-with-inlined-procedure). (3) staged-commit convention aggregated into squash body. Branch experimental/superpowers-bc-skills / follow-up.
close_reason: v2 complete: Skill tool granted + FIRST-ACTION invoke; writing-plans-bdd DAG with explicit RED sub-issue + parallel; SDD parallel dispatch loop + inter-layer gate; staged-commit convention survives squash; work-done-gate Checks 4-5 (plan + test-first artifacts); bc-router wires the full orchestration. Dogfooded via RED-first guardrails. Suite: 185 passed, 11 pre-existing failed, 13 xfailed.

title: BDD Tier 1: executable CLI scenarios for skill-pouring
description: Real TDD. Scenarios: bootstrap pours skills (tree+byte-equality); update re-pours (idempotent byte+mtime, removes managed-but-removed, never touches shop-owned); BC shop receives the BC skill set.
close_reason: CLI iter_skill_files + bootstrap pour + update mirror (idempotent/prune), bc-only; 6 new scenarios green, no regressions vs base

title: CLI: pour templates/skills into BC on bootstrap + update
description: Add a templates/skills/** -> <target>/.claude/skills/ pour to bootstrap and update. Managed/reconciled like agent files: re-pour on update, leave byte+mtime unchanged when identical, remove managed-but-removed skills, never touch shop-owned files. Add a pure importlib.resources accessor (no working-dir path). TDD: failing executable scenarios first. Currently NO mechanism pours skills (the TDD bake is inert).
close_reason: CLI iter_skill_files + bootstrap pour + update mirror (idempotent/prune), bc-only; 6 new scenarios green, no regressions vs base

title: Refactor BC templates to superpowers-style skill architecture
description: Replace the flat-prose BC role prompts (bc-implementer ~475 lines, bc-reviewer) with composable superpowers-style skills driven by a top-level bc-router skill and executed via subagent-driven development with mandatory TDD. Preserve the lead<->BC wire contract (accept messages -> work to done -> emit work_done). BC scope only; lead templates out of scope. Design: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-03-bc-superpowers-skills-design.md. All work on experimental/superpowers-bc-skills.

close_reason: All phases complete: CLI pours/mirrors skills (A); 9 adapted skills authored (B); bc-implementer/bc-reviewer thin bias-shims + router-first primer (C/D); Tier-2 guardrails (E); keep-both xfail transition (F). title:

## Goa
Release workflow emits repository_dispatch to bc-launcher on version-tag release (lead-jx4u / scenario 26ca8a14e01db50c)

Pin via Gherkin scenario 26ca8a14e01db50c; add feature file, conftest step defs, and the .github/workflows release workflow.
notes: Implementer turn complete (lead-jx4u). Wrote features/release_workflow_repository_dispatch_to_bc_launcher.feature (hash 26ca8a14e01db50c), added conftest step defs, implemented .github/workflows/release.yml (version-tag trigger -> repository_dispatch to shopsystem-bc-launcher via secrets.BC_LAUNCHER_DISPATCH_TOKEN). New scenario passes. 4 pre-existing unrelated CLAUDE.md/messaging-encapsulation failures confirmed present on clean tree (out of scope). Handing off to bc-reviewer; not closing.
close_reason: work_done complete signed off for lead-jx4u; scenario 26ca8a14e01db50c passing on origin/main @67f3066
